changes_applied.summary: Exclude tests from production TypeScript build.
Use python3 in backend fallback command.
Wait for localized IBKR sync result instead of a static badge.
Mock i18n explicitly and wrap admin-mode toggle interactions in act().
Align Playwright smoke with the current personal-settings and admin-control-plane route split.
Align Finnhub/GNews fallback expectations with the runtime's local-date normalization semantics.
Normalize Real-PG bundle bootstrap_applied_at values to avoid transient cross-second diffs.
Lock the new Real-PG bundle transient-field normalization contract.
Document WebUI auto-build hardening, test stabilization, and smoke alignment changes.

preserved_existing_local_changes.note: The current branch already contains the personal-settings and admin-control-plane split. This pass validated that state live and aligned smoke coverage without rewriting the branch-wide IA changes.

findings.title: WebUI production build included tests
evidence: main.py --serve-only previously failed while building frontend
production build now passes after excluding src/**/__tests__/** and *.test.ts(x)
findings.recommendation: Keep production build scoped to runtime files only.

findings.title: Localized IBKR sync test raced against async result rendering
evidence: Chinese PortfolioPage test used a static read-only badge as a completion signal
Frontend suite is green after waiting for result text
findings.recommendation: Prefer result-specific waits over static shell content.

findings.title: Shell test fixture relied on implicit i18n and external-store timing
evidence: Raw nav keys surfaced in tests
act warning emitted during admin-mode toggle
Shell tests pass after explicit i18n mocking
findings.recommendation: Keep shell tests deterministic by mocking i18n and state transitions explicitly.

findings.title: Playwright smoke still expected /settings to be the system control plane
evidence: Smoke test still asserted 系统设置 directly under /settings
Current live IA is /settings for personal preferences and /settings/system for the admin control plane
Browser validation now matches the updated smoke flow: open admin tools first, then enter 独立控制台
findings.recommendation: Keep E2E expectations aligned with the current route ownership instead of forcing runtime IA back to an old shape.

findings.title: Large hotspot modules remain high-risk maintenance zones
findings.recommendation: Use benchmark-first, behavior-preserving helper extraction instead of broad refactors.

verified_existing_optimizations.summary: Phase F authority materialization already batches through get_account_shadow_bundles(account_ids=...) instead of per-account shadow fetch loops.
Real-PG bundle output now normalizes temporary SQLite paths, probe session ids, and bootstrap_applied_at values for deterministic comparison-safe artifacts.

intentional_shims.reason: Compatibility shims for legacy PostgreSQL imports; do not remove blindly.
Reviewer and audit history, not runtime waste.

backend.command: python3 -m pytest tests/test_database_doctor.py tests/test_postgres_phase_f.py tests/test_postgres_phase_g.py tests/test_postgres_runtime_real_pg.py -q

backend.result: 1644 passed, 2 skipped, 1 warning, 113 subtests passed; backend-gate all checks passed

frontend.result: pass; frontend auto-build completed and service started

signals: admin mode can be enabled from /settings
the same browser session can open the system control plane
locale-prefixed admin route preserves the unlocked admin session
localized independent-console and admin-log links render correctly
